prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约2042名，2024年跃升至约1128名（前移914位），2025年进一步前移至约853名（前移275位）。近三年位次持续大幅前移，累计前移约1189位， 2025年基准位次约853名，竞争强度逐年攀升；该校在新疆理科招生计划从2023年57人、2024年42人持续缩减至2025年32人；2026年计划进一步缩减至20 人，较2025年减少12人（-37.5%）。招生名额大幅缩减将加剧竞争，推高录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名20 26年位列第28名，稳居全国顶尖工科院校行列，对新疆考生具有极强的吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及投档线异常信号；抖音热度排名第55位（较 热），短视频平台曝光度较高，反映考生关注度持续升温。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等大连理工大学优势专业方向社会热度持续偏高，人工智能相关专业尤为热门；新疆2026年高考 报名总人数约23.8万人，较2025年分科合计约7.65万人大幅增长，考生基数激增将显著加剧录取竞争。；大连理工大学位于辽宁省 ，距新疆较远，但作为985顶尖工科院校，跨省吸引力不受地域限制；该校在新疆招生占比约1.5%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，名额稀缺性进一步推高竞争；历史投档异常信号可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定影响；化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），力 学、土木工程、机械工程、软件工程、管理科学与工程、工商管理获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程获评A-，共10个A-及以上学科，工科综合实力突出，对高分考生吸引 力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近三年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅缩减37.5%、新疆考生总数显著增长以及学校层次吸引力强劲等因素，竞争加剧态势明确。，但考生规模暴增和学校层次吸引力形成更强上推力。预测2026年最低位次约711名，区间604-818名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 2042, rising to about 1128 in 2024 (a forward shift of 914 places), and further advancing to about 853 in 2025 (a forward shift of 275 places). Over the past three years, rankings have consistently and significantly moved forward, with a cumulative shift of about 1189 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 853, indicating increasing competition year by year. The university's enrollment plan for science students in Xinjiang has been continuously reduced from 57 in 2023, 42 in 2024, to 32 in 2025. The 2026 plan further reduces to 20, a decrease of 12 (-37.5%) compared to 2025. The substantial reduction in enrollment quotas will intensify competition and raise admission thresholds.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 28th, firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country, exerting strong appeal to Xinjiang candidates. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving abnormal signals in admission scores. It ranks 55th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting sustained candidate attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, which are advantageous at Dalian University of Technology, maintain high social popularity, with AI-related majors being particularly hot. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is about 238,000, a significant increase from the approximately 76,500 combined subject candidates in 2025. The surge in candidate numbers will markedly intensify admission competition. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, far from Xinjiang, but as a top 985 engineering university, its cross-provincial appeal is not limited by geography. Its enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is about 1.5% (2025), which is moderately low, further increasing competition due to quota scarcity. Historical abnormal admission signals may have some impact on candidates' application psychology. Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A+ (national top), Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Software Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Business Administration are rated A, Control Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering are rated A-, totaling 10 A- and above disciplines. The comprehensive strength in engineering is outstanding, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in rankings over the past three years, the substantial 37.5% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang, and the strong appeal of the university's level, the trend of intensified competition is clear. However, the surge in candidate numbers and the university's level appeal create a stronger upward push. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 711, with a range of 604-818.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Excellence Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Intelligent Molecular Engineering (New Engineering Top Talent Class)
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering (New Engineering Top Talent Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology only offers 6 majors for science students in Xinjiang, all of which are high-level training programs such as Top Talent Classes, Innovation Classes, and Excellence Classes, resulting in extremely high admission thresholds. For rankings within the predicted range (604-818), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Intelligent Molecular Engineering and Energy Storage Science and Engineering as the main direction, with Tier 1 AI and Electronic Information majors as sprint targets. Since all majors are elite training programs, candidates near the upper limit of the ranking range should carefully evaluate, while those significantly better than the lower limit (within 604) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 920, and in 2025 approximately 992, with a slight backward shift of about 72 places, showing a minor loosening trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 992; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 11 students in both 2024 and 2025; the 2026 plan remains 11 students, with enrollment scale unchanged for three consecutive years, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 28th in the Soft Science Ranking. Although it is strong in engineering, the 985 platform still has strong appeal for liberal arts students; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative; Douyin popularity ranking is 55th (relatively hot). Overall popularity is stable and slightly warm, with no obvious negative public opinion impact; Business Administration is rated A, providing disciplinary support for liberal arts business administration majors; liberal arts majors such as Public Administration, Journalism and Communication, and Philosophy, though not the university's core strengths, are still competitive due to the 985 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication majors have obvious social discouragement; Public Administration/Philosophy majors have average popularity; the total number of Xinjiang college entrance exam registrants in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025, and the increase in candidate numbers will raise overall competition levels. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, far from Xinjiang; the liberal arts enrollment majors are all open to both arts and sciences or lean towards liberal arts, with very few students (only 11), and the scarcity of spots provides some support for rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The liberal arts enrollment plan has remained unchanged for three consecutive years, with rankings slightly shifting backward by about 72 places between 2024 and 2025. In 2026, the number of candidates in Xinjiang will increase significantly. Although the overall social popularity of liberal arts majors is relatively cold, the 985 platform and scarce spots still maintain high competition. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1022, with a range of 869-1175.

Journalism and Communication and Philosophy each enroll 2 students, with very few spots, and can be considered as alternatives. Due to the limited selection of liberal arts majors, candidates are advised to carefully choose based on their interests and career plans.
